faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services

aiTryOn.question: How does the AI Try-On feature work?
aiTryOn.answer: Our AI Try-On feature uses advanced machine learning algorithms to virtually apply clothing items to your photos. Simply upload a model photo and select the garments you want to try on.

fileFormats.question: What file formats are supported for uploads?
fileFormats.answer: We support common image formats including JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WebP. For best results, use high-resolution images with good lighting.

processingTime.question: How long does processing take?
processingTime.answer: The AI processing typically takes 5-10 seconds depending on image complexity and server load. You'll see a progress indicator during processing.

saveResults.question: Can I save my try-on results?
saveResults.answer: Yes! You can save your favorite try-on results to your Wardrobe for future reference and comparison.

help.title: Need more help?
help.description: If you can't find the answer you're looking for, please contact us via email or support chat.

hero.title: Power Up Your Creativity
hero.subtitle: Purchase credits to unlock unlimited AI-powered try-on generations

q1.question: What do I earn from referrals?
q1.answer: You earn +1 Usage Limit Cap for each successful referral (up to 10 max). This increases your daily usage capacity for Try-on, Model generation, and Item creation features.

q2.question: What counts as a successful referral?
q2.answer: A referral is completed when your friend signs up using your link AND creates their first outfit post.

q3.question: When do I get the rewards?
q3.answer: Your Usage Limit Cap is increased instantly when your referred friend completes their first outfit.
